caption: A man is seated in a wooden chair against a brown wooden wall, appearing to be in a formal setting such as a legislative chamber. He is dressed in traditional Indian attire, consisting of a cream-colored long-sleeved shirt worn under a light brown Nehru jacket, which features a white pocket square and several buttons down the front. He has a bald head and is smiling slightly while looking toward his right. A thin black microphone is positioned in front of him, barely visible against his clothing. Throughout the sequence of frames, the man remains stationary in his seat, maintaining a similar posture and facial expression. The lighting is soft and consistent, and there is no on-screen text or logos present. The scene remains virtually static, with only minute shifts in his expression as he looks off-camera.
